variants: Dulcie Parnell established her career at Quartz Lantern Broadcast, where her contributions to media are widely recognized. Originally from Basil Bay, she has moved to Arborstone Quay, forging a new path in her professional life. Her achievements have earned her the Prosperity Bell Medallion, highlighting her impact in the industry. Additionally, she is celebrated for her written work, Driftwood Logic Anchor, which reflects her creative vision and style.
